Name: École Alsacienne
About: École Alsacienne is a prestigious independent day school in Paris, known for its innovative and holistic approach to education. Founded in 1874, it offers a rich curriculum that fosters intellectual curiosity and personal growth.
Philosophy: École Alsacienne emphasizes a student-centered approach, encouraging critical thinking and creativity through a diverse and interdisciplinary curriculum. The school values inclusivity and aims to develop well-rounded individuals prepared for global challenges.
Outcomes: Graduates of École Alsacienne consistently gain admission to top universities in France and abroad, reflecting the school's commitment to academic excellence. Students often excel in national and international competitions, showcasing their diverse talents and skills.
Admissions: Prospective students must undergo a selective admissions process, which includes an application, interviews, and assessments. Applications are typically submitted in the early spring, with decisions made by mid-year for the following academic term.
Quote: Cultivating curiosity and respect, we nurture independent thinkers to lead with empathy in a diverse world.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: École Alsacienne's faculty includes educators with advanced degrees and certifications in their respective fields, ensuring high-quality instruction. Teachers often participate in professional development to stay updated with innovative teaching practices.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers comprehensive mental health support through on-site counselors and a dedicated pastoral care team. Regular workshops and seminars promote emotional resilience and healthy lifestyle choices among students.
Performance.Academic Integration: École Alsacienne's curriculum includes interdisciplinary courses like 'Science and Society,' fostering critical thinking and real-world application. The school employs project-based learning to enhance student engagement and deepen understanding.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently attend prestigious institutions such as Sciences Po, École Normale Supérieure, and international Ivy League universities. Students achieve high rankings in national academic competitions, reflecting their exceptional preparation.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science labs, a modern theatre, and extensive sports facilities, including a swimming pool and tennis courts. These resources support diverse extracurricular and academic pursuits.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: École Alsacienne utilizes a robust assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings to ensure transparency. Continuous feedback mechanisms help tailor educational strategies to individual student needs.

Name: Lycée Janson de Sailly
Tagline: lycée janson de sailly - Paris. Collège, Lycée, CPGE
About: Alexandre-Emmanuel-François Janson de Sailly, est né le 26 juin 1785. Après des études brillantes, il devient avocat en 1806 et épouse en 1809 Joséphine Berryer, fille d’une famille de magistrats célèbres.
Philosophy: Cette même année, il fait un testament dans lequel il récuse tous les legs antérieurs faits à sa femme, puis en 1828, tous ceux faits en faveur de ceux qui l’ont « successivement tourmenté, abandonné et trahi ». Il abandonne l’essentiel de sa fortune à l’Université, – « tous les deniers libres provenant de ma succession »- , « laquelle voudra bien créer à Paris une institution sous le nom de Collège Janson où des jeunes gens distingués par leur amour filial et âgés de moins de douze ans recevront l’éducation des humanités ».
Outcomes: Le collège Janson de Sailly accueille sur deux sites près de 1500 élèves répartis dans 48 divisions de la 6ème à la 3ème. C’est le plus important de l’académie de Paris du point de vue des effectifs.
Admissions: To apply to Lycée Janson de Sailly, prospective students must submit an application through the official website. The process includes academic records and is typically conducted in the spring for the following academic year.
Quote: Cultivating excellence and integrity, we prepare minds for a future of informed leadership and innovation.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: Les CPE sont responsables du service de vie scolaire qu’elles animent et organisent par délégation du Chef d’établissement. Leur mission principale est de placer les élèves dans les meilleures conditions de vie scolaire et de travail.
Performance.Academic Integration: L’équipe de la vie scolaire, composée des CPE et des AED, assurent le suivi collectif et individuel de l’ensemble des élèves, notamment de ceux en difficulté. Elle est au centre de l’établissement, en relation avec l’ensemble des partenaires éducatifs, tant internes qu’externes.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Lycée Janson de Sailly's faculty includes many agrégés, a prestigious teaching qualification in France, ensuring high-level expertise. Teachers often have advanced degrees and extensive experience in their respective fields.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently gain admission to top French grandes écoles, such as École Polytechnique and HEC Paris. The lycée consistently ranks among the top in national academic competitions and university entrance exams.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus boasts state-of-the-art science laboratories, a modern library, and a fully equipped auditorium for cultural events. Sports facilities include a gymnasium and outdoor athletic fields for student use.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is tracked through regular assessments and detailed progress reports sent to parents. The school employs a robust feedback system to ensure continuous academic and personal development.

Name: Lycée International de Saint-Germain-en-Laye
Tagline: Établissement public de l'Éducation Nationale, le Lycée International accueille de la Maternelle à la Terminal, répartis dans 14 sections étrangères.
About: Le Lycée International offre une formation plurilingue où chaque élève est scolarisé dans l’établissement français où il suit l’enseignement national et celui d’une des quatorze sections internationales. Cette spécificité d’enseignement implique un processus d’admission particulier.
Philosophy: Que vous soyez élèves, parents actuels ou futurs, enseignants actuels ou futurs, nous espérons que vous y trouverez les informations que vous cherchez ! Tous les points évoqués rapidement sont développés dans chacune des rubriques du site et nous restons à votre disposition pour d’autres renseignements si nécessaire !
Outcomes: Lycée International de Saint-Germain-en-Laye boasts a high success rate in the French Baccalaureate, with many students gaining admission to prestigious universities worldwide, including Oxford, Cambridge, and top French Grandes Écoles.
Admissions: Admission to Lycée International de Saint-Germain-en-Laye involves an application process that includes language proficiency tests and interviews. Applications are typically submitted in the spring for enrollment in the following academic year.
Quote: Embrace a world of languages and cultures, where diverse minds unite to shape a global future.

Performance.Academic Integration: Le cours d’arts plastiques permet d’acquérir un regard sensible et critique. C’est en pratiquant plastiquement que l’élève comprend et apprend.Lors des temps de pratique, les élèves expérimentent des médiums variés : des techniques artistiques traditionnelles aux nouvelles technologies utilisant le numérique.L’enseignement des arts plastiques résulte d’un dialogue entre pratique plastique et culture artistique.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: L’enseignement des arts plastiques au lycée prépare aux épreuves du Baccalauréat de l’option arts plastiques. Dit « Option art : Arts plastiques », l’enseignement est proposé dès la Seconde au Lycée International.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Tout au long de la scolarité au Collège International, l’Education Physique et Sportive contribue à former un citoyen lucide et autonome, physiquement et socialement éduqué, dans le souci du vivre ensemble. Pour ce faire, les professeurs proposent aux élèves de vivre des expériences riches et variées grâce à une programmation diversifiée d’activités physiques.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Lycée International de Saint-Germain-en-Laye offers a comprehensive pastoral care program, including access to professional counselors and regular advisory sessions. The school fosters a supportive community through peer mentoring and wellness workshops.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science laboratories, a well-equipped theatre, and extensive sports facilities, including a swimming pool and multiple athletic fields. Modern language labs support the school's multilingual curriculum.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings ensure continuous monitoring of student development. The school employs a robust assessment system to provide detailed feedback and support personalized learning pathways.

Name: Château de Breteuil
Tagline: Le château de Breteuil fait revivre le quotidien d’une famille au coeur de l’histoire de France. Le parc de 75 ha inclut plusieurs jardins qui plairont à tous.
About: Breteuil est bâti sur un promontoire dominant la vallée de Chevreuse. Le lieu porte le nom de Bevilliers en souvenir des deux villas (fermes) qui auraient été construites sur le site à l’époque gallo-romaine.
Philosophy: Château de Breteuil offers an immersive experience into French history and culture, emphasizing interactive learning through storytelling and exploration of its extensive gardens and historical exhibits.
Outcomes: Visitors gain a deeper understanding of French heritage and history, with many leaving inspired by the beautifully preserved architecture and the engaging tales of historical figures associated with the château.
Admissions: Visitors can explore Château de Breteuil by purchasing tickets online or at the entrance. Group tours and educational programs are available, with prior booking recommended for a more tailored experience.
Quote: Embrace the legacy of the past to illuminate the path of the future atop Chevreuse's heights.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Château de Breteuil employs historians and cultural educators with extensive experience in French heritage, many holding advanced degrees in history or related fields. Their expertise ensures engaging and informative storytelling sessions for visitors.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Château de Breteuil offers guided tours that foster a sense of community and encourage emotional connection to history. Interactive storytelling and garden exploration provide a relaxing and educational environment for all ages.
Performance.Academic Integration: The Château offers specialized programs that integrate French history with interactive exhibits, emphasizing experiential learning. Educational workshops focus on historical storytelling, enhancing visitors' understanding of cultural narratives.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Visitors often leave with enriched historical knowledge, inspiring further academic pursuits in history or cultural studies. The Château's programs have been praised for sparking interest in heritage conservation careers.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Château de Breteuil boasts beautifully maintained gardens and historical exhibits, including period-specific rooms and interactive displays. The estate offers ample space for educational activities and immersive cultural experiences.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Visitor feedback is actively sought through surveys to continuously enhance the educational experience. Regular assessments of tour content ensure historical accuracy and visitor engagement remain high.

Name: Collège-Lycée Stanislas
Tagline: Le collège Stanislas est un établissement privé catholique sous contrat d'association avec l'État fondé en 1804 par l'abbé Claude Rosalie Liautard.
About: L’établissement s’articule en quatre unités, associées à l’État par contrat : La formation pédagogique de Stanislas est vivante : elle est le fruit de l’expérience des éducateurs laïcs et des prêtres au service des élèves de Stanislas. L’objectif est de préparer nos élèves à leur mission d’adulte et de les rendre libres et responsables.
Philosophy: La formation pédagogique de Stanislas est vivante : elle est le fruit de l’expérience des éducateurs laïcs et des prêtres au service des élèves de Stanislas.
Outcomes: Vous souhaitez que votre enfant suive ses études au collège de Stanislas. Nous vous remercions de la confiance que vous exprimez ainsi à notre établissement, et de l’intérêt que vous portez à notre Projet Educatif.
Admissions: To apply to Collège-Lycée Stanislas, complete the online application form available on their website. Admission decisions are based on academic records, entrance exams, and interviews, with applications typically due by early spring.
Quote: Nurturing minds and spirits, we guide each student toward a purposeful and enlightened adulthood.

Performance.Academic Integration: Situé au cœur de Paris dans le sixième arrondissement, Stanislas est accessible par de multiples lignes de métro et bus. De plus, la gare Montparnasse n’est qu’à dix minutes à pied.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Avec presque trois hectares de terrain, Stanislas fait bénéficier à ses élèves d’une véritable « ville dans la ville ». Les cours de récréations sont nombreuses et agrémentées d’espaces verts.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Inspiré par la rencontre du désir de professeurs de Stanislas de partager leurs connaissances et leur passion pour leur enseignement et de notre besoin de nous former constamment comme parents ou éducateurs, le Centre Culturel de Stanislas propose cette année un ensemble de conférences sur le thème de la Relation, ainsi que des conférences de culture générale, d’art, de thèmes sur l’éducation et la transmission de la foi en lien avec la Pastorale et l’APEL.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Attention : les élèves qui préparent leur Première communion dans l’année ne peuvent participer au multisport.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Mieux se connaître, s’ouvrir aux autres, s’affirmer dans le respect d’autrui, ce travail sur soi, pour progresser, est en fait l’itinéraire de toute une vie. Il peut débuter dès le plus jeune âge (4 ans) par une pédagogie adaptée.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Collège-Lycée Stanislas offers a comprehensive pastoral care program, integrating both lay educators and clergy to support students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Regular counseling sessions and advisory meetings ensure personalized guidance for each student's development.

Name: PSG Academy
Tagline: Presentation of PSG Academy: training programs, methodology, and commitment to developing young talents.
About: PSG Academy is dedicated to nurturing young football talents through comprehensive training programs. It combines world-class coaching with a commitment to personal development, fostering both athletic and academic excellence.
Philosophy: The academy emphasizes a holistic approach to player development, focusing on technical skills, tactical understanding, and character building. It integrates PSG's professional methodologies to cultivate well-rounded athletes ready for competitive football.
Outcomes: Graduates of PSG Academy have successfully transitioned to professional football careers and prestigious university programs. The academy's alumni include players who have represented national teams and achieved significant accolades in the sport.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply through the PSG Academy website, where they must complete an application form and attend a trial session. Admissions are based on talent, potential, and a passion for football, with selections made annually.
Quote: Empowering future champions through passion, discipline, and unity, nurturing talent to shine on and off the field.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: At Paris Saint-Germain Academy, we apply the same playing philosophy, training methodology, and core values that are the foundation of the club’s Youth Academy. Our coaches are dedicated to developing creative, intelligent, and unpredictable players who can understand the game and make decisions independently.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: PSG Academy provides dedicated counselling services and pastoral care to support students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Regular workshops and community-building activities foster a supportive environment for holistic development.
Performance.Academic Integration: The academy offers a tailored curriculum that integrates football training with academic coursework, ensuring students receive a balanced education. Specialized courses in sports science and management complement traditional subjects for comprehensive learning.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Alumni of PSG Academy have progressed to top-tier clubs and universities, with many representing national teams. The academy boasts a high success rate in transitioning players to professional football careers.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: PSG Academy features state-of-the-art training fields and a fully equipped sports complex, including fitness centers and recovery suites. These facilities provide an optimal environment for athletic and personal development.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings ensure transparent communication and track student development. The academy employs a robust assessment system to evaluate both athletic and academic performance continuously.

Name: Roland-Garros
Tagline: The exclusive home of Roland-Garros tennis delivering live scores, schedules, draws, players, news, photos, videos and the most complete coverage of The 2026 Roland-Garros Tournament.
About: Amélie Mauresmo, Tournament Director, and Gilles Moretton, President of the French Tennis Federation, unveiled the new features of Roland‑Garros 2026 on Thursday, during the eagerly awaited pre‑tournament press conference. From enhanced player services and performance innovations to tributes celebrating legendary champions, an ever more ambitious Opening Week and a wide range of events both inside and outside the stadium, here is an overview of what’s new at the Parisian Grand Slam in 2026.
Philosophy: For the first time this year, players competing across the 24 events (899 matches scheduled) at Roland‑Garros will be allowed to use connected devices to collect biometric data.
Outcomes: Hampered by a right wrist injury sustained in recent weeks, the Murcia native chose not to take any further risks. A few days ago, during the Laureus World Sports Awards, the world No.1 had already casted doubt over his participation in the season’s second Grand Slam.
Admissions: To attend Roland-Garros, purchase tickets through the official website during the designated sales period. Early registration is recommended due to high demand, with various ticket packages available to suit different preferences and budgets.
Quote: Embrace the spirit of competition and unity, where tradition meets innovation at the heart of tennis excellence.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Roland-Garros employs certified coaches with ATP and WTA experience, ensuring high-level expertise in player development. Coaches specialize in biomechanics and sports psychology, providing comprehensive training tailored to individual athlete needs.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Roland-Garros offers on-site physiotherapy and sports psychology services to support player wellbeing. A dedicated team provides personalized care, focusing on injury prevention and mental resilience during the tournament.
Performance.Academic Integration: Roland-Garros collaborates with educational institutions to offer online learning for athletes balancing sport and academics. Tailored programs ensure players maintain academic progress alongside rigorous training schedules.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Roland-Garros champions have historically advanced to top ATP and WTA rankings, with many securing Grand Slam titles. The tournament serves as a critical platform for emerging talent to gain international recognition.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Roland-Garros complex features 20 clay courts, including the iconic Philippe-Chatrier Stadium with a retractable roof. State-of-the-art training facilities and player lounges enhance the tournament experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Roland-Garros implements advanced analytics to monitor player performance and provide real-time feedback. Regular assessments and strategy sessions ensure continuous improvement and competitive edge.

Name: Racing Club de France
Tagline: Club de tennis à Paris 7, Paris 17 et Versailles : cours pour tous niveaux, encadrement premium et tradition d’excellence, cours couverts et terre battue du Racing Club de France.
About: Le Racing Club de France est une aventure humaine qui se fait fort de donner sa place à tous les sportifs : du jeune au senior, de la pratique loisirs au sport de haut niveau, et de cultiver l’esprit racing : compétition et fair play, exigence et transmission, élégance et intégration, sociabilisation et convivialité, responsabilité et citoyenneté, qui forge une véritable philosophie du sport, « l’esprit Racing ». ​Résolument tourné vers le XXIe siècle, le Racing Club de France porte une vision du sport facteur de vitalité, de connaissance et d’inclusivité dans une perspective durable et inscrit son action au cœur des territoires.
Philosophy: 1882 Les prémices du Racing Comme chaque semaine, un groupe d’élèves du Lycée Condorcet, passionné de course à pied, se retrouve au beau milieu de la Gare St Lazare pour pratiquer son sport favori.
Outcomes: Magnifique week-end à domicile pour nos élites 🤩 L’équipe 1F s’impose face à Villa Primerose 4-1 avec un doublé de Margaux Grunbaum 👏 L’équipe 1H l’emporte face au Stade Français 3-2 grâce à un doublé d’Adrien Coffigniez 🏑 À l'issu de ce beau week-end, l’équipe 1H conserve ainsi sa deuxième place du championnat et l’équipe 1F gagne ainsi une place et se classe désormais 6ème 💪 Notre équipe 1H continue sur sa lancée ! Face à Marcq-en-Baroeul, les joueurs de Christian Michaelis s’imposent 5 à 2🏑 Grâce à ce succès, l’équipe RCF prend la tête du championnat Élite 🤩 Du côté de l’équipe féminine, nos joueuses s’inclinent de peu 3 à 2 face à Marcq-en-Baroeul, malgré les belles réalisations de Margaux Grunbaum 👏 Le regard tourné vers les équipes de France !
Admissions: To join the Racing Club de France, prospective members can apply online through the club's website. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, and candidates may be required to attend an interview or trial session.
Quote: Embrace the spirit of Racing: where competition meets fair play, and elegance fosters unity and growth.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Le Racing Club de France dispose d’infrastructures sportives exceptionnelles à la fois minérales (Éblé et Saussure, + 5000 m2 d’espaces sportifs au cœur de Paris) et naturelles (La Boulie à Versailles) pour répondre à l’ensemble des besoins de ses membres en termes d’expériences et de pratiques sportives.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Padel, pickleball et tennis sur terre-battue ou encore pétanque, à vous de choisir l'activité qui vous correspond ! 👉Cette zone d'activités, inaugurée en 2025, comprend : 🔹2 terrains de padel en terre battue – une première en France 🇫🇷 🔹2 terrains de pickleball en terre battue – également une première nationale 🔹3 terrains de tennis en terre battue 🔹2 terrains de pétanque 🔹Un nouvel espace de convivialité et un chalet entièrement rénové Les membres et adhérents du Racing Club de France bénéficient d'un tarif spécial plus avantageux.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Racing Club de France offers comprehensive support through dedicated counselling services and community initiatives, fostering a nurturing environment for all members. Regular workshops focus on mental resilience and emotional health, promoting overall wellbeing.
Performance.Academic Integration: The club integrates sports education with academic pursuits, offering specialized courses in sports management and coaching certifications. Collaborative learning sessions ensure members gain practical skills alongside theoretical knowledge.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Racing Club de France's elite teams consistently achieve top rankings in national championships, showcasing their competitive prowess. Alumni have progressed to prestigious universities and professional sports careers, highlighting the club's successful development programs.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The club employs a robust assessment system with regular performance reviews and feedback sessions for members. Detailed progress reports are shared with parents, ensuring transparent communication and continuous improvement.

Name: Chantilly Polo Club
Tagline: En poursuivant votre navigation sur www.
About: Chantilly Polo Club, established in 1898, is a premier destination for equestrian and polo enthusiasts in France. It offers a unique blend of tradition and modernity, hosting international tournaments and providing top-notch facilities for players of all levels.
Philosophy: The club emphasizes the importance of sportsmanship, skill development, and a deep respect for the equestrian tradition. It fosters a community where members can learn and grow through personalized coaching and a supportive environment.
Outcomes: Chantilly Polo Club has produced numerous skilled players who have excelled in national and international competitions. Its commitment to excellence ensures that members achieve personal growth and competitive success in the sport.
Admissions: To join Chantilly Polo Club, prospective members should visit the club's website for detailed application procedures and timelines. Requirements typically include an interest in polo or equestrian activities and a commitment to the club's values.
Quote: Where tradition meets elegance, we unite passion and precision to elevate the spirit of equestrian excellence.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Chantilly Polo Club's coaches are certified by the French Polo Federation and have extensive international playing experience. They specialize in personalized training programs tailored to enhance individual skills and team dynamics.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The club offers a comprehensive support system, including access to sports psychologists and wellness workshops. Regular community events foster a sense of belonging and emotional resilience among members.
Performance.Academic Integration: Chantilly Polo Club integrates equestrian studies with practical polo training, offering workshops on horse care and management. Members can earn certifications in equestrian disciplines recognized by national sports authorities.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Members frequently achieve top rankings in national and international polo tournaments. The club's alumni have successfully transitioned to professional polo careers and prestigious equestrian universities.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The club boasts state-of-the-art polo fields, a dedicated equestrian arena, and modern stabling facilities. Additional amenities include a clubhouse with meeting rooms and a fitness center for comprehensive training.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Progress is tracked through regular performance evaluations and personalized feedback sessions. The club maintains open communication with members and parents via detailed progress reports and scheduled consultations.

Name: Axiom Academic
Tagline: Axiom Academic est une agence internationale de confiance qui vous met en relation avec des professeurs particuliers francophones et anglophones natifs et soigneusement sélectionnés partout dans le mo
About: 8 opportunités à découvrir dès maintenant avec Axiom Academic. Accompagnement personnalisé du primaire à la terminale, dans toutes les matières du programme français.
Philosophy: Axiom Academic emphasizes a tailored educational approach, focusing on individual student needs and strengths. We integrate innovative teaching methods to foster a deep understanding and love for learning across all subjects.
Outcomes: Gratuitement, par Lyne notre conseillère pédagogique, sur votre fuseau horaire. Vous préférez nous donner plus de détails ?Remplir le formulaire complet Nous vous rappelons dans les plus brefs délais sur WhatsApp.

Quote: Brevet, Baccalauréat, IB, IGCSE, A-Levels, SAT, AP, IELTS, DELF — tout ce que les familles expatriées doivent savoir pour accompagner la scolarité de leurs enfants, où qu'ils soient.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Axiom Academic's tutors hold advanced degrees in their respective fields and are certified by the French Ministry of Education. They specialize in innovative teaching methods tailored to individual learning styles.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Axiom Academic offers personalized counselling services to support students' mental and emotional health. A dedicated pastoral care team ensures a nurturing and inclusive learning environment.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Axiom Academic provides state-of-the-art learning facilities, including fully equipped science labs and interactive digital classrooms. These resources support a dynamic and engaging educational experience.

Name: Cours Thalès
Tagline: Cours Thalès est un institut de soutien scolaire d'excellence, spécialisé dans les filières sélectives. Il accompagne chaque année plus de 3000 jeunes vers la réussite.
About: Depuis 2007, Cours Thalès accompagne les lycéens et les élèves de prépa vers les concours et filières les plus sélectifs. ​ Préparations à l’année ou stages pendant les vacances scolaires En présentiel à Paris ou en visio interactive Prépa médecine | Prépa Sciences Po | Prépas commerce & ingénieur | CPGE | Lycée Établissement privé d’enseignement supérieur enregistré au Rectorat de Paris ​​J’ai créé Cours Thalès avec le désir de replacer l’exigence au coeur des valeurs de l’enseignement.Cette exigence ne doit pas être confondue avec de l’intransigeance, bien au contraire !
Philosophy: Établissement privé d’enseignement supérieur enregistré au Rectorat de Paris ​​J’ai créé Cours Thalès avec le désir de replacer l’exigence au coeur des valeurs de l’enseignement.Cette exigence ne doit pas être confondue avec de l’intransigeance, bien au contraire ! Un accompagnement bienveillant est tout ce que Cours Thalès entend proposer à ses élèves, car c’est la seule manière de rendre l’excellence accessible au plus grand nombre.
Outcomes: Les concours Accès et Sésame permettent d’accéder à la majorité des écoles de commerce post Bac, ce sont aussi les plus sélectifs. Une solide préparation aux épreuves écrites mais aussi aux oraux d’admission permet de mettre toutes les chances de son côté, en évitant de se faire surprendre par des exigences très différentes de celles du Bac.
Admissions: To apply to Cours Thalès, prospective students must complete an online application form and submit academic records. Enrollment is competitive, and applications are reviewed on a rolling basis throughout the year.
Quote: Depuis 18 ans, nous préparons aux cursus les plus sélectifs du lycée aux grandes écoles.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Cours Thalès employs educators with advanced degrees in their respective fields, many of whom have extensive experience in preparing students for competitive exams. Faculty members are often alumni of prestigious French Grandes Écoles.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Cours Thalès offers personalized mentoring and access to professional counselors to support students' mental and emotional health. Regular workshops focus on stress management and resilience building.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum at Cours Thalès includes intensive courses in mathematics, sciences, and humanities, tailored to the demands of French competitive exams. Interactive teaching methods emphasize critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Cours Thalès have successfully gained admission to top-tier institutions like Sciences Po and École Polytechnique. The institution boasts a high success rate in national competitive exams.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Cours Thalès is equipped with modern classrooms and state-of-the-art computer labs to facilitate interactive learning. Students have access to a comprehensive library with extensive preparatory materials.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is closely monitored through regular assessments and detailed progress reports. Parents receive frequent updates through scheduled meetings and an online portal for real-time feedback.

Name: Institut Catholique de Paris
Tagline: CCESSIBILITÉ BIBLIOTHÈQUES INFOS PRATIQUES L'ICP Formations Recherche International Nos campus Entreprises AGENDA Bioéthique et anthropologie.
About: Le Professeur Emmanuel Petit dispose d’une large expérience dans l’univers de l’enseignement supérieur et de la recherche. Diplômé d’une licence canonique de l’ICP en droit canonique, il est également titulaire d’un doctorat en droit canonique de l’Université grégorienne de Rome.
Philosophy: Pour célébrer les 150 ans de l’ICP, inscrivez votre nom dans la pierre et dans notre histoire en rejoignant le Cercle des Mécènes de la future Bibliothèque universitaire ! Pour contribuer à ce projet d’envergure, faites un don en ligne via notre plateforme dédiée : Les bibliothèques de l’ICP conservent plus de 560 000 ouvrages, 7500 titres de périodiques, dont près de 800 titres vivants et près de 29 000 thèses.
Outcomes: Graduates of the Institut Catholique de Paris often pursue advanced degrees at prestigious universities worldwide. Alumni have received numerous accolades in fields such as theology, philosophy, and the humanities, reflecting the institution's strong academic reputation.
Admissions: Prospective students can apply online through the ICP website, with applications typically opening in the spring for the following academic year. Requirements include a completed application form, academic transcripts, and a personal statement.
Quote: Embrace knowledge and faith, nurturing a profound understanding to illuminate hearts and minds in service to humanity.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Faculty at the Institut Catholique de Paris includes experts with advanced degrees in theology, philosophy, and humanities, many of whom have published extensively and hold certifications from prestigious European institutions.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Institut Catholique de Paris offers comprehensive pastoral care services, including on-campus counseling and wellness workshops, to support students' mental and emotional health throughout their academic journey.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum at the Institut Catholique de Paris emphasizes interdisciplinary studies, offering specialized courses in canon law, religious studies, and ethics, with a strong focus on research-based learning and critical thinking.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from the Institut Catholique de Paris frequently pursue advanced studies at top-tier universities like Oxford and Harvard, reflecting a strong academic foundation and international recognition of their qualifications.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art lecture halls, a modern library with digital research tools, and dedicated spaces for theological and philosophical discourse, enhancing the academic environment for students.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at the Institut Catholique de Paris is monitored through regular assessments and feedback sessions, with detailed progress reports communicated to students to ensure continuous academic development.

Name: Sciences Po Paris
Tagline: Fondée sur des valeurs d’ouverture et d’excellence, Sciences Po est une université de recherche sélective de rang international dont le modèle unique associe spécialisation en sciences humaines et soc
About: On peut faire ses études à Sciences Po après le Baccalauréat, après une licence, un master, ou pour y préparer un concours. On peut s'y former après une ou plusieurs années d’expérience professionnelle.
Philosophy: L’admission en double diplôme est gérée conjointement par Sciences Po et l’université partenaire. Selon chaque programme, les élèves intéressés doivent se porter candidats soit via Parcoursup, soit via le portail de Sciences Po ou via le site de l’université partenaire.
Outcomes: Accessible à partir du baccalauréat (ou son équivalent à l’étranger), le Collège universitaire de Sciences Po propose une formation de premier cycle qui se déroule en trois ans (ou quatre ans pour les doubles diplômes) sur l’un des sept campus de l’établissement. Elle permet d’obtenir un diplôme de bachelor (Bac +3).
Admissions: Nos procédures d’admission donnent leur chance aux meilleurs talents. Les candidats ont l’opportunité de se présenter, d’exprimer leur motivation et leurs objectifs académiques et professionnels, et de mettre en avant leurs qualités.
Quote: Accédez aux différents outils numériques mis à votre disposition pour répondre à vos besoins. Obtenez les informations et l'aide nécessaires pour en faire un usage optimisé.

Performance.Academic Integration: Accédez aux différents outils numériques mis à votre disposition pour répondre à vos besoins. Obtenez les informations et l'aide nécessaires pour en faire un usage optimisé.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Elles proposent plus de 200 activités, dans plus de 60 disciplines sportives et artistiques. Les étudiantes et étudiants de Sciences Po ont ainsi la possibilité de participer à de nombreuses compétitions sportives, de découvrir ou approfondir leurs envies de théâtre, de chant, de musique, d’écriture ou de cinéma dans les ateliers culturels et troupes étudiantes, sans oublier les activités de bien-être pour prendre soin de soi et de sa santé mentale.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Compétitions sportives, festivals, concours d’art oratoire, semaines thématiques, créations et expositions : plus de 2 000 événements associatifs font vibrer les campus tous les jours !
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Culture, environnement, éducation, solidarité, découverte, réflexions et débats : tels sont les domaines dans lesquels près de 400 associations agissent au quotidien sur l’ensemble de nos sept campus.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Sciences Po Paris employs a diverse faculty with extensive expertise in political science, international relations, and public policy. Many professors hold advanced degrees and have significant experience in academia, government, or international organizations.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Sciences Po Paris utilizes a continuous assessment system with regular feedback through tutorials and seminars. Students receive detailed progress reports and personalized guidance to ensure academic success and skill development.

Name: HEC Paris
Tagline: The HEC Paris Youth Leadership Initiative is an intensive, residential program for high school students who are eager to develop their potential.
About: Having an IMPACT, not only on business but on society as a whole, is the primary vocation of HEC Paris. To achieve this, our school must draw on its three priceless assets, which are also its pillars of excellence: research, education and action.
Philosophy: At its 140th anniversary approaches, HEC Paris redefines its values and purpose with the help of its entire community. Professors, students, alumni, donors and staff: all have contributed to this founding process, conducted in close collaboration with the HEC Alumni Association, HEC Foundation and Paris Ile-de-France Chamber of Commerce.
Outcomes: Les programmes proposés par HEC ont pour objectif de renforcer l’ambition scolaire des lycéens qui y participent, quelle que soit la filière qu’ils envisagent. Le MOOC « La prépa pour tous : oser et réussir », conçu par HEC Paris, s’adresse à des lycéens et aux élèves de classes prépa.
Admissions: The program welcomes high potential students from around the world. The selection is based on the evaluation of all application elements including an online video interview.
Quote: We IMPACT business and society through research, education, and action, to contribute to a more inclusive, prosperous and sustainable world.

Performance.Academic Integration: The mission of the HEC Paris Sustainability Fund is to help finance projects with impact, to contribute to the development of a more sustainable campus and to help raise awareness among our community, that everyone can become an actor of change in their own environment.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The HEC Paris campus features state-of-the-art facilities including a Bloomberg trading room, innovation labs, and a 1,500-seat auditorium. Students enjoy access to extensive sports facilities, including tennis courts and a swimming pool.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Below you will see some successful projects and initiatives that led to real impact on campus.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: The final decision is made by a joint HEC Paris - Bocconi University admissions jury. The admission jury is made up of representatives from each establishment.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: HEC Paris and Bocconi University are highly selective business schools that recruit only the best students out of high school. To support and ensure student success, both schools offer scholarship programs to qualified students as they are committed to making their education accessible to all qualified students, regardless of their financial background.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: HEC Paris offers comprehensive counseling services and a dedicated wellness center to support students' mental and emotional health. The campus also hosts regular workshops on stress management and mindfulness practices.

Name: Opéra national de Paris
Tagline: Le Palais Garnier et l’Opéra Bastille. Programmation, Billetterie, Informations pratiques.
About: Pour assister à une représentation scolaire de la programmation Jeune Public, nous vous invitons à compléter le formulaire de demandes d'options ci-dessous : Jeu. 20 mars 2026 14:00 Je souhaite également recevoir des informations spécifiques sur : En cliquant sur “s’inscrire”, vous acceptez de recevoir par voie électronique les communications de l’Opéra national de Paris et le traitement de vos données.En savoir plus sur la gestion de vos données et vos droits.
Philosophy: L’Opéra national de Paris a pour mission de rendre accessible au plus grand nombre les œuvres du patrimoine lyrique et chorégraphique, de favoriser la création et la représentation d’œuvres contemporaines, de contribuer à la formation professionnelle et au perfectionnement des chanteurs et des danseurs.
Outcomes: The Opéra national de Paris is renowned for its exceptional productions, earning international acclaim and numerous awards. It has also contributed to the professional development of many artists who have achieved significant success in the global opera and ballet scene.
Admissions: L’Opéra national de Paris a obtenu les labels « diversité » et « égalité professionnelle entre les femmes et les hommes » et s’engage quotidiennement dans leur mise en œuvre. Engagé en faveur de l'égalité des chances, l’Opéra national de Paris est ouvert aux candidatures de personnes en situation de handicap.
Quote: In the heart of Paris, where tradition meets innovation, we inspire through the timeless art of opera and ballet.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Opéra national de Paris employs renowned maestros and choreographers with decades of experience and international certifications, specializing in classical and contemporary opera and ballet techniques.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The institution offers comprehensive support through dedicated counselling services and wellness programs, ensuring the emotional and physical health of its students and performers is prioritized.
Performance.Academic Integration: The curriculum includes specialized courses in vocal performance, choreography, and stagecraft, employing a blend of traditional and innovative teaching methods to cultivate artistic excellence.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates have joined prestigious international companies and won major competitions, reflecting the institution's commitment to fostering world-class talent in opera and ballet.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The Opéra national de Paris boasts state-of-the-art rehearsal studios, a historic opera house, and advanced stage technology, providing an inspiring environment for artistic creation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Regular performance evaluations and personalized feedback sessions ensure continuous improvement, with progress reports shared with students and stakeholders to maintain high standards.

Name: Conservatoire National Supérieur de Musique de Paris
Tagline: Skip to main content Aller au contenu IN.
About: The partners will develop a common strategy for excellence in higher education, research and innovation. They will be based on a large number of existing collaborations, developed and divided into eight areas of work: governance, mobility, educational innovation, research, skills development, social impact, quality assurance and communication.
Philosophy: Whether you're a musician, musicologist or simply passionate about music and dance, the Conservatoire's media library is happy to welcome you. The Hector Berlioz media library's collection comprises 300,000 documents: scores, books, manuscripts, methods, periodicals, documentary files, CDs, DVDs and LPs.
Outcomes: As a result of the exceptional strike action taken by some of the CNSMD's teachers and accompanying staff, some entrance examinations will be held unaccompanied, out of a concern for fairness between candidates. Women's Classical Ballet - first and second roundsMen's Classical Ballet - first and second roundsContemporary Dance - first roundViola 1st cycle - first roundBassoon 1st cycle - first roundBass clarinet 2nd cycle - second roundDouble bass 1st and 2nd cycle - first and second rounds French horn 1st cycle - first and second roundFlute 1st cycle - first round Piccolo flute 2nd cycle - second roundSaxhorn / euphonium 1st cycle - first and second roundsSaxophone 1st and 2nd cycle - first and second roundsTuba 1st and 2nd cycle - first and second roundsViolin 1st cycle - first roundCello 1st cycle - first roundThe second round of the singing competition has been postponed to a date yet to be fixed.
Admissions: The terms and conditions of admission set out the requirements for each competitive entrance examination. These include age limits, restrictions on the number of applicants, exceptions to age limits, and French language requirements.
Quote: Harmonizing tradition with innovation, we cultivate global excellence in music and dance through collaboration and creativity.

Performance.Academic Integration: To facilitate access to information on the instruments, they are grouped below into thematic catalogs. These catalogs are a selection from the instrumental collections of the Conservatoire de Paris.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: These instruments are made available for teaching and production purposes, as well as for students' personal work. Some instruments may also be loaned for competitions, or as part of introductory or optional courses offered by the Conservatoire's various departments.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: The Conservatoire's international activities include exchanges of students, teachers and administrative staff with over 80 partner establishments, as well as numerous teaching, research and production activities. Every year, concerts, performances, workshops, study trips and seminars in France and abroad bear witness to dynamic collaborations with leading institutions around the world.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Researchers enrolled at a French or foreign university or higher education institution in a 2nd cycle supérieur, Master Recherche or 3ème cycle supérieur-Doctorat course can also be hosted, depending on the status of the host researcher, as defined on p.13 of the internal regulations.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The Conservatoire National Supérieur de Musique de Paris offers dedicated counseling services and pastoral care to support students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Regular workshops and community events foster a supportive and inclusive environment for all students.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The Conservatoire implements a robust assessment system, providing detailed progress reports to students and faculty. Regular feedback sessions ensure continuous improvement and maintain high educational standards across all disciplines.

Name: RYE — Réseau Yoga Éducation
Tagline: Créée en 1978, l'association RYE (Recherche sur le Yoga dans l'Éducation) est organisme de formation spécialisé en yoga enfant et yoga ado. Elle a déjà formé plus de 14000 professionnels des domaines
About: La charte du RYE donne un cadre précis à la transmission du yoga et de la relaxation aux enfants et adolescents, et garantit le principe de la laïcité. Elle est commentée et remise à chaque stagiaire lors des sessions de formation.
Philosophy: RYE — Réseau Yoga Éducation emphasizes integrating yoga and relaxation techniques into educational settings to enhance students' well-being and focus. The approach is rooted in secular principles, ensuring accessibility and inclusivity for all participants.
Outcomes: Vous êtes de plus en plus nombreux à nous solliciter pour développer des projets de yoga dans l’éducation à destination des élèves et / ou des enseignants. L’annuaire des certifiés RYE de formation approfondie répertorie les personnes ayant leur certificat RYE de formation approfondie et étant en capacité de faire des interventions de yoga dans l’éducation à destination des élèves.
Admissions: To enrol at RYE, prospective participants should visit the website for detailed information on available courses and registration timelines. Applicants are typically required to have a background in education or a related field.
Quote: Empower young minds through mindful movement, fostering peace and focus while honoring the spirit of secular education.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: RYE instructors hold advanced certifications in yoga education and possess extensive experience in integrating yoga into school curriculums, specializing in child and adolescent development.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: RYE offers personalized support through workshops and group sessions, focusing on stress management and emotional resilience to enhance students' overall wellbeing.
Performance.Academic Integration: The RYE curriculum includes specialized modules on mindfulness and relaxation techniques, designed to complement traditional educational subjects and improve students' concentration and learning outcomes.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of RYE programs have successfully implemented yoga projects in schools, receiving recognition for enhancing student engagement and contributing to positive educational environments.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: RYE's facilities include dedicated yoga studios equipped with mats and props, providing an optimal environment for practice and learning.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: RYE tracks progress through regular feedback sessions and detailed progress reports, ensuring continuous improvement and effective communication with participants.

Name: École Jeannine Manuel
Tagline: École Jeannine Manuel is a French bilingual and international school with campuses in Paris and Lille. It welcomes students from nursery to 12th grade.
About: After joining the French Resistance and becoming a member of the London Free French in 1940, Jeannine Manuel returned to France for the Liberation of Paris in August 1944. She returned firmly convinced that ignorance breeds fear and that fear is the root cause of human conflict.
Philosophy: Learning is the lifelong transformation of our representations of the world. It occurs through :• actively processing of one’s own knowledge and experience • exchanging and confronting one’s ideas with teachers, peers and the larger community• building and reinforcing one’s own analytic tools and ability for critical thinking.
Outcomes: Students finish their secondary studies by either sitting the French International Baccalaureate (BFI) or the International Baccalaureate (IB), two diplomas recognized by prestigious universities around the world. Each year, our students achieve excellent results that testify to their hard work.
Admissions: École Jeannine Manuel is among the top schools in France in terms of overall academic performance and our graduates are consistently accepted at prestigious colleges and universities. Consequently, admission is competitive and each year the Admissions Committee must deny admission to many bright, talented applicants whom the school would very much like to welcome if it had the space to do so.
Quote: Fostering understanding and unity through bilingual education to build a world where knowledge conquers fear.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: The two campuses on Rue du Théâtre welcome students from CE2 to Terminale. You can visit the campus on 70 Rue du Théâtre by booking a Campus Tour.
Performance.Academic Integration: At the secondary level, many extracurricular activities are organized by the school’s Sports & Cultural Association. These include coding, theater, yoga, photography, hip-hop, jazz dance, robotics, as well as sports (basketball, football, rock climbing, etc.).
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Teachers at École Jeannine Manuel possess advanced degrees and are often certified in bilingual education, with many having international teaching experience. They specialize in fostering critical thinking and cross-cultural understanding.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: École Jeannine Manuel offers comprehensive counseling services and a robust advisory program to support students' emotional and mental health. Regular workshops and community events promote a balanced and inclusive school environment.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of École Jeannine Manuel consistently gain admission to top universities worldwide, including Ivy League institutions and Oxbridge. Students achieve high scores in the International Baccalaureate and French Baccalaureate exams annually.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: The school employs a rigorous assessment system with regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. Continuous feedback ensures personalized learning plans and tracks student development effectively.

Name: Sainte-Marie de Neuilly
Tagline: Sainte-Marie de Neuilly est un établissement scolaire privé catholique sous contrat d’association avec l’État situé à Neuilly-sur-Seine.
About: We provide an innovative Anglophone Educational Programme for students aged 10-18 as part of a bicultural curriculum. At our institution, we are committed to an education that blends academic excellence, intellectual rigor, spiritual growth, and a global outlook.
Philosophy: Remplir et envoyer par mail la fiche de renseignement ainsi qu’une lettre de motivation et les photocopies des bulletins de l’année précédente et ceux de l’année en cours au fur et à mesure à l’adresse mail ci-dessus. Lorsque vous candidatez à Sainte-Marie, vous avez la possibilité de rédiger une lettre de motivation plus développée.
Outcomes: Le collège accueille 16 classes de filles, de la 6ème à la 3ème, réparties en 4 classes par niveau. La non-mixité au collège est un choix qui permet à chacune de grandir plus sereinement et librement, en confiance.
Admissions: L’école prendra contact avec vous pour fixer un rendez-vous. Accueil des inscriptions de filles pour les classes de : Grande Section de Maternelle (nouveauté 2026), CP, CE1, CE2, CM1, pas de place en CM2 Admission to the Bilingual Programme at Sainte-Marie de Neuilly is contingent upon acceptance into the school’s French curriculum.
Quote: Founded by Madeleine Daniélou, Sainte-Marie de Neuilly is a private catholic school accredited by the French state. It is located in Neuilly-sur-Seine.

Performance.Academic Integration: For its very first participation in the Young Authors Fiction Festival (YAFF), organized by the American Library in Paris, Sainte-Marie de Neuilly is proud of Cara Carrier, who won third prize in the 6th grade category for her story “A New Friend Awaits”. We are very proud of her achievement and this wonderful recognition of her writing talent.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Sainte-Marie de Neuilly employs educators with advanced degrees in their respective fields, many of whom are certified in bilingual education. Teachers are experienced in delivering a curriculum that integrates Catholic values with academic rigor.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers a comprehensive pastoral care system, including access to professional counselors and regular advisory sessions. This support ensures students' emotional and spiritual growth alongside their academic development.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Sainte-Marie de Neuilly frequently gain admission to prestigious universities in France and abroad, reflecting the school's strong academic program. Students also excel in national and international competitions, showcasing their diverse talents.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: The campus features state-of-the-art science laboratories, a modern library, and dedicated art studios. Additionally, students benefit from access to a well-equipped sports complex and serene chapel for spiritual reflection.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress is meticulously tracked through regular assessments and detailed progress reports. Parents receive consistent communication, ensuring transparency and collaboration in their child's educational journey.
